subject: PC slow after recent Windows update
description: After cumulative update, boot and login are much slower; disk light solid minutes.

ts_steps.title: Idle on AC
ts_steps.action: Leave powered 1–2 h to finish servicing/indexer.

ts_steps.title: Task Manager disk
ts_steps.action: Sort by disk; note TiWorker, SearchIndexer, System.

ts_steps.title: cleanmgr
ts_steps.action: cleanmgr → system files → Windows Update Cleanup.

ts_steps.title: Startup apps trim
ts_steps.action: Task Manager → Startup — disable non-essential high impact in batches.

ts_steps.title: Services review
ts_steps.action: Non-Microsoft third-party to Manual if policy allows.

ts_steps.title: Uninstall quality update
ts_steps.action: Within 10 days: Update history → Uninstall updates.

ts_steps.title: Event Viewer disk
ts_steps.action: System log for disk warnings during slow boot.

ts_steps.title: Feedback
ts_steps.action: If rollback fixes, report regression with build numbers.

internal_information: Indexer, servicing, driver regression. Rollback confirms correlation.
